attributes.description: PowerShell script-block and pipeline-execution logging. 4104 (Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational) captures every script block executed — including base64-encoded, AMSI-bypassed, and obfuscated content. 4103 captures pipeline execution. Lower-priority but still useful: 400/600 from Windows PowerShell channel. If an attacker (or insider) ran PowerShell, this is where you see what they actually executed.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"winlog.channel : (\"Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational\" or \"Windows PowerShell\") or winlog.event_id : (4104 or 4103 or 400 or 403 or 600 or 800)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Event Log: PowerShell Script & Pipeline Activity (4104/4103)
